name: ado-sprint-planner
title: ADO Sprint Planner
description: See your current-sprint Azure DevOps work items, your personal progress, and a day-by-day to-do generated from the sprint duration.
author: debashish

preferences.name: pat
preferences.title: Personal Access Token
preferences.description: ADO PAT. Needs Work Items (Read) — and (Read & Write) if you want the optional push-to-ADO action.

preferences.name: organization
preferences.title: Organization
preferences.description: Your ADO org name, e.g. 'contoso' for dev.azure.com/contoso

preferences.name: team
preferences.title: Team
preferences.description: Primary team whose current iteration defines your sprint. Required for Plan Sprint; if set, also included in My Sprint's fetch.

preferences.name: teams
preferences.title: Additional Teams
preferences.description: Comma-separated extra team names. My Sprint pulls each team's current-iteration items and shows them segregated by team. Leave blank to only use Team above.

preferences.name: doneState
preferences.title: Done State
preferences.description: The state your process uses for completed items (Agile: Closed, Scrum: Done, Basic: Done)

preferences.name: extraOpenStates
preferences.title: Extra Open States
preferences.description: Comma-separated states to keep visible even if ADO categorizes them as terminal — e.g. 'Failed' (failed work that needs rework, distinct from closed).

preferences.name: dailyCapacity
preferences.title: Daily Capacity
preferences.description: How many items to schedule per working day when generating the plan

preferences.name: includeBacklog
preferences.title: Include Backlog
preferences.label: Plan my other open tickets alongside the sprint
preferences.description: When on, the planner also pulls your open assigned tickets outside the current sprint (behind sprint items) so they get worked and closed.

preferences.name: planMode
preferences.title: Planner Mode
preferences.description: Deterministic sequences by priority locally. Auto (AI) uses Gemini to sequence smarter — requires an API key below.

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Enables Auto (AI) sequencing via the Gemini free tier. Note: work-item titles are sent to Google when you re-plan with AI.

commands.name: my-sprint
commands.title: My Sprint
commands.subtitle: ADO Sprint Planner
commands.description: Your work items in the ongoing sprint with personal done/total progress.

commands.name: my-tickets
commands.title: My Tickets
commands.subtitle: ADO Sprint Planner
commands.description: Every open work item assigned to you across the project, regardless of sprint or team.

commands.name: today
commands.title: Today's To-Do
commands.subtitle: ADO Sprint Planner
commands.description: Today's planned items — check them off as you go.

commands.name: plan-sprint
commands.title: Plan Sprint
commands.subtitle: ADO Sprint Planner
commands.description: Generate a day-by-day to-do across the remaining sprint days.

commands.name: sprint-menubar
commands.title: Sprint Glance
commands.subtitle: ADO Sprint Planner
commands.description: Menu-bar glance at what's left today.
